pi_items.source: Task description specifies title 'Streaming Services Consumer Evaluation Q4 2024' which contains both keywords
LimeSurvey documentation: M=Multiple Choice (QT_M_MULTIPLE_CHOICE), F=Array. Task description requires 'Multiple Choice question' and 'Array (5 point choice) question'
Verified via LimeSurvey documentation (https://www.limesurvey.org/manual/QS:Array_filter/en). Task description explicitly mentions 'Configure the array_filter attribute'
Task description lists exactly 7 streaming services: Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Disney+, HBO Max, Hulu, Apple TV+, and Peacock

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a LimeSurvey survey titled 'Streaming Services Consumer Evaluation Q4 2024' with three question groups. The first group contains a Multiple Choice question (type M) with 7 sub-questions listing streaming services (Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Disney+, HBO Max, Hulu, Apple TV+, Peacock). Groups 2 and 3 each contain Array questions (type F) with the same 7 sub-questions. The critical requirement is configuring the array_filter attribute on both Array questions to reference the Multiple Choice question code, enabling conditional display of only the streaming services selected in the first question. The survey must be activated and set to anonymous responses. All metadata claims about title keywords, question types, the array_filter attribute, and minimum subquestion count have been verified against LimeSurvey documentation and the task specification.
